violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the chips aisle has an accumulation of food debris. Food debris shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the attraction of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

The drain plug for the outside trash dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
